body:
Why wouldn't you enter! | Friend --

What happens at the Iowa caucus in just 11 days is up to this team -- and whether we step up right now when it counts.

**Chip in $1 to help Hillary win this critical first contest, and any donation you make today will automatically enter you for a chance to fly out to Iowa on Caucus Day to meet Hillary, President Clinton, and Chelsea:**

Thanks,

Hillary for America

P.S. The contest to win a trip to meet the Clintons ends at midnight, **[so don't wait!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ1MzAwNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIyOTYwODYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** (Not that you should be waiting to donate! 11 days 'til Iowa!)

name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Today marks the 43rd anniversary of Roe v. Wade, and our hearts
are heavy as we remember one of the great shadows in our nation's
history. More than 56 million children have been denied the
God-given right to life. We should cherish and defend every life,
especially the most vulnerable among us.

On this anniversary,
thousands of families, congregations, and students march for Life
in Washington. It is an incredible testament to the strength of
the pro-life movement, and Ted Cruz is proud to support them in
their tireless fight to protect the sanctity of every life.

We need a leader in
the White House who will defund Planned Parenthood, sign
life-affirming legislation, and promote a culture of life. That
starts with electing Ted Cruz as our next President -- a leader
who has defended life at the Supreme Court and always championed
the precious gift of life.

And today, as we open
our Greenville, South Carolina, Camp Cruz, it's an opportunity
for you to volunteer for Ted so that together we can stand for
life. If you are interested, please sign up here.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

body:
Dear Patriot,

There's only one crystal clear voice for
liberty in this battle for the Republican nomination for
President.

And very shortly, Ron Paul will be boarding a
plane for Iowa for a nonstop campaign schedule with Rand to
ensure everyone knows who that one person is!

Patriot, can Ron and I count on you to make
your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to
Rand's Caucus Takeover Money Bomb right away?

We've seen the other candidates are making
their play for the liberty movement. They even talk a good game
now and then. But when the chips are down, we see their true
views.

For example, one of the most critical issues
facing America today, the horrific impact the Federal Reserve and
the is having on the American economy.

Yet, when Rand secured a vote on Audit the
Fed on January 12, Senator Cruz was nowhere to be found!

Now, we learn he received a million dollar
loan from Goldman Sachs he attempted to keep off the books?

And this is after writing a legal brief in
SUPPORT of President Obama's $800 BILLION stimulus package,
stating it would "further the greater purpose of economic
recovery for America!"

Whether it's the Federal Reserve, the Fourth
Amendment, government spending or foreign policy, all other
candidates are nothing more than pretenders.

Rand is the real deal. And Ron Paul is going
to help us show Iowa he stands with Rand.

I hope you'll join us with your most generous
contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to Rand's Caucus

Let's show the Washington Machine why they
should fear the liberty movement!

In liberty,
Doug Stafford

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I met an atheist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45908014:Jg-q_lrNj:m:1:1349778030:1C77928C69634FFD04651D541C7B55D4:r)
---
| | | | Peter, The other day in Iowa, I was asked by a self-identified atheist about whether I've been talking too much about my faith on the campaign trail.
[**In fact, he asked if I was running for "pastor in chief." Well, I answered his question -- and the message I had for him has now been viewed over 6.3 million times and shared over 100,000 times on social media:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45908015:Jg-q_lrNj:m:1:1349778030:1C77928C69634FFD04651D541C7B55D4:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45908015:Jg-q_lrNj:m:1:1349778030:1C77928C69634FFD04651D541C7B55D4:r)
---
| Conservatives -- believers and non-believers alike -- loved seeing someone stand up for religious freedom and the importance of faith in the public square. But I need your help to spread the word even further -- **[click here to watch the video (if you haven 't yet), make a donation to our campaign, then share the link with a friend.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45908015:Jg-q_lrNj:m:1:1349778030:1C77928C69634FFD04651D541C7B55D4:r)** I want to live in a country where Americans feel comfortable living out their faith, in private AND in public. But we've seen from the attacks liberals will level -- and the policies of the Obama Administration -- that some on the left don't agree. I've promised to voters everywhere I go: I will not be a president who will pit you against any other group of Americans, but I'm going to be honest about my values. If that sounds like the kind of President you want -- gauging from the reaction to this video, you're not alone -- **[go here to make an immediate, secure donation to my campaign right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45908015:Jg-q_lrNj:m:1:1349778030:1C77928C69634FFD04651D541C7B55D4:r)** And spread the message, because the stakes are too high just to let this election go by. Issues like the role of faith in the public square, marginalized by this president and liberal extremism, are foundational to who we are as a country. Thank you for **[your support so far this campaign](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45908015:Jg-q_lrNj:m:1:1349778030:1C77928C69634FFD04651D541C7B55D4:r)**. We're not going to back down. Sincerely,Marco Rubio
---

Your donation will go directly towards helping Dr. Carson secure a victory in Iowa, which will build the momentum necessary to carry us to New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada and beyond. Adam, this is when your support really counts.

We have just 10 days to go and the clock is ticking.

name: Rand Paul
subject: We Can Save Millions of Lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Today, thousands of Americans will
participate in the annual March for Life, yet Congress refuses to
recognize that the right to life is guaranteed to all Americans-
born and unborn. It is the government's duty to protect life,
liberty, and property, but primarily and most importantly, a
government must protect Life.
As a physician, one of the first things I
have embraced the most is the principle of 'do no harm.' As a
senator, I've chosen to follow that creed.
Life begins at conception and that abortion
takes the life of an innocent human being.
Just yesterday, I introduced the Life at
Conception Act. This legislation would implement equal protection
under the 14th Amendment for the right to life of each born and
unborn human.
The Life at Conception Act does not amend or
interpret the Constitution, but rather relies on the 14th
Amendment, which specifically authorizes Congress to enforce its
provisions.
Our government should not be responsible for
funding abortions, and as president, I will do everything to stop
the flow of taxpayer dollars to groups who perform or advocate
for abortion.
Since the Roe v. Wade decision, over 50
million children have been killed in abortion procedures. I
believe we can save millions of lives with reasonable legislation
that respects our constitution.
Stand with me today to protect the unborn.

In Liberty,
Ron Paul

subject: Roe v Wade: We won't go back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20161222.2&refcode2=e20161222.2&amount=15?ms=20160122.2&refcode=e20160122.2&refcode2=e20160122.2&amount=15)

Friend, Today is the 43rd anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ Supreme Court decision, which granted women the constitutional right to make their own reproductive choices and to decide for themselves if, when, and how to grow their families. But anti-choicers have been coming after women's reproductive health in a big way. From state houses to Congress and all the way up to the Supreme Court, right-wingers are partnering with Republican lawmakers to do everything they can to deny women their constitutional right to choose. [**On this anniversary, we need to stand up for women 's health and rights more forcefully than we ever have before. Will you join me and add your name to show your support for a woman's constitutional right to choose?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3979004049730043904/-2364086339160244224?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvw) The last five years of Republican control have seen more anti-choice restrictions passed than any other five-year period since _Roe v. Wade_ was decided, and the results across the country have been devastating. Anti-choice Republicans need to hear from us loud and clear: We. Will. Not. Go. Back. For too many decades, women were forced to provide their own abortions in back alleys, endangering their health and putting their very lives at risk. There can be no return, and there can be no surrender. Women deserve the right to make their own decisions about their bodies, their families and their lives, and on this, we will not compromise. [**Add your name here to declare your unwavering support for women 's reproductive rights.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3979004049730043904/-2364086339160244224?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvw) This fight is at our doorsteps, and it's going to take every single one of our voices to push back and win. Thanks,
Katie

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Saturday night
body:
#
_If you 're in the path of the winter storm this weekend, play it safe and only travel to volunteering events if you're confident you won't have travel problems. If you do have to stay home, [**make phone calls for Bernie instead!**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d16/43f17890/434d15d5/620e7584/2344128548/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/phonebank")_
_**_
Dear Friend,
Tomorrow night -- just nine days before the Iowa caucuses -- Bernie wants to talk directly to his best supporters.
He's asking us to do something huge: defy the odds and win the Democratic nomination for President of the United States. Tomorrow we'll gather to take another important step in that journey together.
# Bernie's pre-Iowa Address to Volunteers
**What:** Special Live Address to Bernie Supporters
**Where:** Eleven55 Ripley Sky Lounge
Sky Lounge 1155 Ripley Street
Silver Spring, MD 20910
**When:** Saturday, January 23rd
5:30 pm EST
**[RSVP to Attend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rpyz)** **[Click here to RSVP& learn more »](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rpyz)**
It will take an enormous amount of work to win Iowa and New Hampshire and then the rest of the early primaries, including 11 states voting on March 1 (aka Super Tuesday).
That's why we're all gathering together tomorrow night so Bernie can talk about what it's going to take from all of us to win this election and address the moral crisis that comes from almost all of the wealth and income in this country going to the top 1 percent.
**[You can find more events on our map for Bernie's live video address on January 23.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d16/43f17890/434d15d5/620e7585/2344128548/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&eventtype=LIVESTREAM&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")**
Bernie's put victory within reach, it's up for us to do the work to make it happen.
It's an honor to work alongside you in this movement.
Sincerely,
Zack Exley
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d16/43f17890/434d15d5/620e7582/2344128548/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d16/43f17890/434d15d5/620e7583/2344128548/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d16/43f17890/434d15d5/620e7580/2344128548/VEsHBQ/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d16/43f17890/434d15d5/620e7581/2344128548/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
